data_description.client_id: The Client ID that is copied from the Solyx Energy app.
data_description.client_secret: The Client secret that is copied from the Solyx Energy app.
data_description.nymo_device_id: The Nymo device ID that is copied from the Solyx Energy app.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Solyx Energy
reauth_confirm.description: Your credentials are no longer valid for device {device_id}. Re-enter your Client ID and Client Secret.

error.invalid_auth: Could not authorize using your credentials. Please verify the Client ID, Client Secret, and your device ID.
error.data_error: Couldn't retrieve device data due to a communication error.
